goal: User always knows what's in stock without typing it in.

screens.name: Pantry Home
screens.purpose: Shows current known inventory, low-stock flags, and the entry point to scan.

states.loading: Skeleton list rows while pantryItems query resolves.
states.empty: First-run state: 'Nothing scanned yet' + prominent Scan CTA, no shame-y copy.
states.success: Grouped list (Low stock / Well stocked), each row shows item, estimated qty, last-seen date.
states.error: Inline banner, 'Couldn't load your pantry' + retry, list not wiped from local cache.

screens.name: Camera Capture
screens.purpose: Live camera view for a fridge/shelf photo.

states.empty: Permission-denied state: explanation + deep link to Settings, no dead end.
states.success: Framing guide overlay + capture button; low-light warning banner if detected.
states.error: Camera unavailable (rare) — fallback to manual entry offered immediately.

screens.name: Scan Review
screens.purpose: Shows detected items for user to confirm, correct, or discard before saving.

states.loading: 'Reading your photo...' processing spinner, target under 3s for receipts.
states.empty: 'Couldn't detect anything clearly' — offers manual entry, does not silently fail.
states.success: Editable list: item name, quantity stepper, confidence indicator per row, swipe to remove a false positive.
states.error: Partial-detection state: shows what it did catch, flags the rest as 'add manually'.

screens.name: Receipt Import
screens.purpose: OCR entry point — photograph or pick a receipt image, feeds both PantryLens and order history (Smart Reading).

states.empty: No receipt selected yet — camera or photo-library picker.
states.success: Parsed line items handed to scan_review for confirmation.
states.error: Unreadable receipt (crumpled/faded) — 'We couldn't read this one' + retake or manual entry.

screens.name: Item Detail
screens.purpose: Single pantry item — edit quantity, mark as out, see predicted run-out date.

states.success: Quantity editor, predictedRunOutDate shown as 'Likely out around ...', delete action.

userFlow: User opens Pantry Home, sees empty state on first run.
Taps 'Scan Receipt' after a grocery run.
Photographs receipt -> OCR parses line items (loading state).
Lands on Scan Review with editable, confidence-scored list.
Confirms -> items merge into Pantry Home, low-stock badges recalculated.
Days later, a push notification flags milk as low -> deep links to Pantry Home.
edgeCases: Poor lighting on fridge photo -> warn before capture, don't silently return garbage.
Unbranded/loose produce -> falls back to generic category label, not a guess at brand.
Camera permission denied -> manual entry must remain a fully first-class path, not a punishment state.
Multi-language packaging -> low-confidence rows flagged for manual confirm rather than auto-accepted.
notes: Ship receipt_import + scan_review first (well-defined OCR problem). scan_capture for fridge photos is a Phase-5 item — same review screen is reused for both, so the UI investment isn't wasted.
